Protist Genomic Overview

3,687 species across 19 groups (12 supergroups) - NCBI Datasets v2, SRA & Taxonomy. A row with an Assembly Accession but “-” in Annotation Accession is a genome assembly without annotation; “-” in both columns (with blank GC%) marks an SRA-only species (no genome).

Accession (assembly & annotation): GCF_ RefSeq GCA_ GenBank - none

Tip: click a column header to sort. SuperGroup, Protist Group and Species sort alphabetically (A→Z, then Z→A); GC% and the read columns sort numerically (max→min, then min→max).
